tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"squid-proxy-1","command":"which ssl_crtd || which security_file_certgen || find /usr -maxdepth 4 -type f \\( -name security_file_certgen -o -name ssl_crtd \\) 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,200p'"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
which ssl_crtd || which security_file_certgen || find /usr -maxdepth 4 -type f \( -name security_file_certgen -o -name ssl_crtd \) 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,200p'
/usr/lib/squid/security_file_certgen
squid-proxy-1:/# 
squid-proxy-1:/#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"squid-proxy-1","command":"mkdir -p /etc/squid/ssl_cert /var/lib/ssl_db && openssl genrsa -out /etc/squid/ssl_cert/myCA.key 2048 && openssl req -new -x509 -days 3650 -key /etc/squid/ssl_cert/myCA.key -out /etc/squid/ssl_cert/myCA.crt -subj \"/CN=Squid-Intercept-CA\" && cat /etc/squid/ssl_cert/myCA.crt /etc/squid/ssl_cert/myCA.key > /etc/squid/ssl_cert/squid.pem && /usr/lib/squid/security_file_certgen -c -s /var/lib/ssl_db -M 4MB && ls -l /etc/squid/ssl_cert /var/lib/ssl_db && echo CREATED_SSL_OK:$?"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"squid-proxy-1","command":"cat > /tmp/squid_block.conf <<'EOF'
# Block attacker destination and POSTs
acl attacker dst 203.0.113.1
http_access deny attacker
acl BlockedMethods method POST
request_body_max_size 1024
http_access deny BlockedMethods
# Ensure 8443 is treated as SSL port
acl SSL_ports port 8443
EOF
sed -n '1,160p' /tmp/squid_block.conf && echo '--- ORIG START ---' && sed -n '1,160p' /etc/squid/squid.conf | sed -n '1,60p'"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
cat > /tmp/squid_block.conf <<'EOF'
> # Block attacker destination and POSTs
> acl attacker dst 203.0.113.1
> http_access deny attacker
> acl BlockedMethods method POST
> request_body_max_size 1024
> http_access deny BlockedMethods
> # Ensure 8443 is treated as SSL port
> acl SSL_ports port 8443
> EOF
squid-proxy-1:/# sed -n '1,160p' /tmp/squid_block.conf && echo '--- ORIG START ---' && sed -n '1,160p' /etc/squid/squid.conf | sed -n '1,60p'
# Block attacker destination and POSTs
acl attacker dst 203.0.113.1
http_access deny attacker
acl BlockedMethods method POST
request_body_max_size 1024
http_access deny BlockedMethods
# Ensure 8443 is treated as SSL port
acl SSL_ports port 8443
--- ORIG START ---
acl BlockedMethods method POST
request_body_max_size 1024
# Deny large uploads and POST to prevent file exfil over HTTP(S)
http_access deny BlockedMethods
acl localnet src 0.0.0.1-0.255.255.255
acl localnet src 10.0.0.0/8
acl localnet src 100.64.0.0/10
acl localnet src 169.254.0.0/16
acl localnet src 172.16.0.0/12
acl localnet src 192.168.0.0/16
acl localnet src 172.17.0.0/16

acl SSL_ports port 443
acl Safe_ports port 80
acl Safe_ports port 21
acl Safe_ports port 443
acl Safe_ports port 70
acl Safe_ports port 210
acl Safe_ports port 1025-65535
acl Safe_ports port 280
acl Safe_ports port 488
acl Safe_ports port 591
acl Safe_ports port 777
acl CONNECT method CONNECT

http_access deny !Safe_ports
http_access deny CONNECT !SSL_ports
http_access allow localnet
http_access allow localhost
http_access deny all

http_port 3128
coredump_dir /var/cache/squid
dns_nameservers 8.8.8.8 8.8.4.4acl BlockedMethods method POST
http_access deny BlockedMethods
request_body_max_size 1024
squid-proxy-1:/# 
squid-proxy-1:/#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"squid-proxy-1","command":"cat /tmp/squid_block.conf /etc/squid/squid.conf > /etc/squid/squid.conf.new && mv /etc/squid/squid.conf.new /etc/squid/squid.conf && squid -k reconfigure && sleep 1 && ps aux | egrep 'squid|security_file_certgen' | sed -n '1,200p' && echo EXIT:$?"}
